mapper.sql: id, order_id, stage_no, stage_name, stage_desc, stage_amount, plan_start_at, plan_end_at, submit_content, deliverable_json, status, actual_start_at, actual_submit_at, actual_accept_at, reject_reason, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: update `order_stage` set status = 1, actual_start_at = #{actualStartAt}, updated_at = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and stage_no = #{stageNo} and status in (0, 4)

update `order_stage` set status = 2, submit_content = #{submitContent}, deliverable_json = #{deliverableJson}, actual_submit_at = #{actualSubmitAt}, updated_at = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and stage_no = #{stageNo} and status = 1
update `order_stage` set status = 3, actual_accept_at = #{actualAcceptAt}, updated_at = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and stage_no = #{stageNo} and status = 2
update `order_stage` set status = 4, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and stage_no = #{stageNo} and status = 2
